name: Gill Holland
bio:
Gill is the General Manager of T.J’s Gymnastics Club, and heads the Pre school programme. Her involvement in gymnastics began in childhood, progressed to coaching and, after graduating in 1988 with a BSc (Hons) in Sports Studies, she began coaching as a career. TJ’s opened in September 1988, September 2024 is Gill’s 36th year running TJ’s!! It is fantastic having some of the gymnasts from a few years back now bringing their children!

Gill holds both her Gymnastics and Pre-school Club Coach Level 3 coaching certificates required by the British Gymnastics Association to run classes. Gill is married to Chris and they have two young adult sons, Max and Sam. In August 2012 she was diagnosed with breast cancer, so had to take a year out of coaching for the treatment, but returned back to coaching in Sept 2013. Now it’s all a distant memory and enjoying being back to her old self!

name: Natalie Garlick
bio:
Natalie has also been involved in gymnastics since childhood, was coached by Gill as a teenager and then, as a young adult she began to assist coaching at TJ’s. She has been working at T.J’s since 1997, gaining her Level 3 qualifications in General and Pre-school Club Coach. Natalie is married to Paul, their eldest, Jack, will be 19 in July ’24 and Lucy will be 17 in March ‘24.

Natalie heads the General Gymnastic programme, being the lead coach in the competitions we enter and the display team and is our Special Needs Co-Ordinator.

name: Jade Shaw
bio: Jade first joined TJ’s aged 1 in the Toddler Gym classes and progressed to our Wed 4.30 squad! Since January 2023 when we moved to Raynes Park, she has taken a the role as Deputy Head Coach. She has two daughters, Kyla and Nyrah, who both attend TJ’s. She holds her Level 2 UKCC Assistant Coach and the Pre-school add on module.

name: Nelum Samara – Safeguarding and Welfare Officer
bio: Nelum took the Welfare role in Sept ’24. Nelum also was coached by Gill during her school days, and they lost contact when Nelum started Uni. With the help of social media they got back in touch. Nelum runs her own jewelry business and is carer for her Mum. She is really excited to be actively involved again in TJ’s and the sport she loves!

name: Hazel Pithers
bio: Hazel joined TJ’s coaching team in January 2023. She holds her Level 2 coaching qualification. She is training to qualify for stunt work.

name: Hannah Pettit
bio: A while back, (not saying how long!), Hannah was coached at school by Gill! She then joined TJ’s Toddler Gym with her daughter and then joined the coaching team for a short while. She is now Mum to 3 children and in January 2023 she started coaching again in the Mini Gym Classes. Hannah holds her Level 1 General Gymnastics qualification.

name: JV Mattei
bio: JV was introduced to TJ’s in January ’24 when his daughter joined the Mini Gym. Street Dance is his passion and he coaches in a number of school and community settings. He began assisting in coaching at TJ’s in January ’24 and is loving being part of the TJ’s team. He is taking his Gymnastics Instructor Qualification in October ’24.

name: Nadine Henry
bio: Nadine was coached by Natalie and Kate when Gill was coaching limited classes whilst looking after her boys. Like Nelum, she too lost touch when she started Uni, but recently came to one of our social events. She is training in physiotherapy and available to coach. We are pleased to have her back on the team. Nadine holds the Gymnastics Helper award.

name: Beth Drew
bio: Beth is in Year 13 and studying for her A levels. She first attended TJ’s aged 2 in the Toddler Gym! She is a keen netball player and runner. She has been assisting the coaches in our after school classes since Sept 2021 and holds the Gymnastics Helper award.

name: Lucy Garlick
bio: Clue is in the name, Lucy is Natalie’s daughter! Lucy is a member of the GB Climbing squad, climbing is her passion and since June 2023 she has been in full time training. She has traveled to USA, Russia, South Korea, China to name a few countries competing for the GB Team. She has been assisting in our coaching since September 2022 and holds the Gymnastics Helper award.

name: Bea Gray
bio: Bea was a member of our Elite Squad until December 2022, assisted at TJ’s for her D of E award and has now chosen to continue to focus on coaching rather than participation. She is a keen rugby player and was a Ball Girl at Wimbledon 2024 and holds the Gymnastics Helper award.

name: Maya Francis
bio: Maya was a member of our Elite Squad until April 2024 and has now chosen to continue to focus on coaching rather than participation. She is a Yr 10 student and is a keen dancer. Maya holds the Gymnastics Helper award.

name: Cara Kelly
bio: Cara also started TJ’s age 1yr! She was a member of our Girls’ Squad until July 2024 and has now chosen to continue to focus on coaching rather than participation. She is a Yr 10 student and holds the Gymnastics Helper award.

name: Mio Nakashima
bio: Mio was member of our Elite Squad until December 2022, assisted at TJ’s for their D of E award and has now chosen to continue to focus on coaching rather than participation. In April ’24 she left to study for a year in Japan, but we hope to see her back in ’25!

name: Kate Harding
bio: Kate had been working full time at TJ’s Gym Club Sept 2007 until December 2022. She had been involved in the Club for much longer as she was one of our first to attend our ‘Invitation Only’ classes! She also holds her Level 3 in Pre-School and General Gymnastics. She was a fantastic assistant to Natalie and Gill, but in January 2023 she decided to have a career change. She still features in our list of coaches as she will cover if need be and may well be back in the future……!!

name: Joe Kelly
bio: Joe also has been at TJ’s Gymnastics Club since he was 1 year old! He assisted in the after school classes until July 2023. He holds the Level 1 Assistant coaching qualification. In Sept ’23 he began his Uni studying at Bath Spa Uni, but hopes to coach occsaionally in the holidays. He also teaches piano and passed his Grade 8 in July ’21!

name: Ali Cuffe
bio: Ali coached with Gill in the 1990’s and between them set up TJ’s squad classes. Ali moved from regular training (up to 20 hrs a week!), competing in the British Championship into coaching. Aged 25 she then decided to stop coaching to pursue a different career. She married Chris and has 3 boys and in 2018 decided to return to coaching, then Covid happened! Ali is now a cover coach, continuing her interest in gymnastics but is now running Campervan Carpets.
